prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image (the approved step 17 — a hand from upper-left lowering a small object into an open zip-seal specimen bag whose front face has the DIALED HEALTH logo and a square QR code) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY — same hand from upper-left, same bag silhouette and proportions, same parted zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH logo (DIALED top-LEFT + horizontal line with center EKG spike + HEALTH bottom-RIGHT, OFFSET diagonal layout) in the upper area of the bag, same QR code on the centered/lower-middle area of the bag (square outline with grid of small black-and-white modules and three corner positioning squares), same line-art style on pure white background, same uniform medium-weight black ink line work, same minimal short parallel hatching for shadow.

THE ONLY MODIFICATION — REPLACE the small capped blood-filled vial currently being lowered into the bag with the ASSEMBLED PROTECTOR TUBE (matching the THIRD reference image — the approved step 21 — for its illustrated look, and the SECOND reference image — the real product photo — for proportions and embossing). The protector tube is a short stout cylindrical container, taller than it is wide (height ≈ 1.5x diameter), drawn in pure black line-art on white. Two stacked sections:
  - LOWER section: WHITE cylindrical body (line-art outlines, no fill) with the word 'HEALTH' embossed horizontally across its side wall in bold sans-serif capital letters that wrap with the cylinder curvature. A thin horizontal seam line around the top of this section where the cap meets the body.
  - UPPER section (the cap, sitting on top): same cylindrical diameter as the body, drawn as SOLID BLACK FILL (the cap is black plastic) with the word 'DIALED' showing in white/reversed-out capital letters embossed across its side wall in the same bold sans-serif. Cap height is roughly 40-50% of the body height. Flat solid-black top.

When assembled the brand 'DIALED' (on the black cap) sits directly above 'HEALTH' (on the white body), so the two words read together as 'DIALED HEALTH' down the side of the tube.

The hand's grip should pinch the BLACK CAP (top section) of the protector tube between thumb and fingers, lowering the assembled tube down into the bag through the parted zip seal. Lower portion of the white HEALTH body sits inside the bag (drawn lighter / faintly through the translucent plastic), upper portion (black DIALED cap + top of the white body) above the seal line.

Scale: the protector tube should occupy roughly the same vertical footprint in the composition as the original vial did — small, fitting comfortably in the bag with the hand still clearly larger above it. Do not enlarge.

Do NOT modify anything else — same hand pose, same bag shape, same zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH logo, same QR code, same line weight, same white background, same line-art style. Pure black ink line work on white; the only solid-black fill anywhere is the protector tube's cap. No red, no blood, no other color. No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers, no arrows.
refImages: DIaled Health Instruction Graphics/Product Refs/protector tube.png
